positive: A clean, abstract geometric pattern representing mountain peaks and stylized waves. Using only three colors: deep teal, sandstone beige, and charcoal gray. Mid-century modern design, line art, negative space utilization, scalable vector illustration, crisp edges, repeating tileable pattern.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, organic shapes, watercolor, messy, gradient
